pi_items.source: Drupal entity display naming convention (core.entity_view_display.{entity_type}.{bundle}.{view_mode}); Drupal Commerce ProductVariation entity uses 'commerce_product_variation' as entity ID; 'default' is standard bundle and view mode in Drupal Commerce

Drupal standard image styles documentation confirms Large is 480x480; Drupal Commerce uses standard Drupal image styles; setup_task.sh initializes to 'medium' (220x220) and task requires changing to 'large'

Task description explicitly states 'Move the SKU field from the Disabled/Hidden section to the Content section'; setup_task.sh removes SKU component to set initial hidden state; expected outcome is SKU visible in content region

privileged_info_summary: The task modifies the Drupal Commerce product variation display configuration (core.entity_view_display.commerce_product_variation.default.default). The initial state hides the SKU field and uses the 'medium' image style (220x220). The expected final state requires making the SKU field visible and changing the image style to 'large' (480x480), both of which are standard Drupal configurations.
